chapter_title: Sales of Vehicles by Private Owners
text: Only a dealer, a person described in Section 286, or the registered owner of record shall sell or offer for sale a vehicle of a type required to be registered pursuant to Division 3 (commencing with Section 4000) or identified pursuant to Division 16.5 (commencing with Section 38000), except as provided in Section 12121.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 10. Sales of Vehicles by Private Owners [12120 - 12121]
##### § 12120

Only a dealer, a person described in Section 286, or the registered owner of record shall sell or offer for sale a vehicle of a type required to be registered pursuant to Division 3 (commencing with Section 4000) or identified pursuant to Division 16.5 (commencing with Section 38000), except as provided in Section 12121.

*(Added by Stats. 1986, Ch. 668, Sec. 1.)*

subsections.text: Only a dealer, a person described in Section 286, or the registered owner of record shall sell or offer for sale a vehicle of a type required to be registered pursuant to Division 3 (commencing with Section 4000) or identified pursuant to Division 16.5 (commencing with Section 38000), except as provided in Section 12121.
